FindingInfo.Title: IAM user does not have MFA enabled

Description: MFA is not enabled for IAM user admin

Recommendation.Text: Enable MFA for the IAM user to add an additional layer of authentication security.

FindingInfo.Title: IAM user does not have MFA enabled

Description: MFA is not enabled for IAM user developer1

Recommendation.Text: Enable MFA for the IAM user to add an additional layer of authentication security.

FindingInfo.Title: IAM user has MFA enabled

Description: MFA is enabled for IAM user security-admin

Recommendation.Text: Enable MFA for the IAM user to add an additional layer of authentication security.

FindingInfo.Title: Root account has active access keys

Description: The root account has active access keys which poses a critical security risk

Recommendation.Text: Delete root account access keys and use IAM users with least-privilege policies instead.

FindingInfo.Title: IAM password policy meets complexity requirements

Description: IAM password policy requires minimum 14 characters with complexity requirements

Recommendation.Text: Set a strong password policy requiring minimum length, uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.

FindingInfo.Title: IAM policy allows full administrative privileges

Description: IAM policy FullAdminAccess grants full administrative privileges with Action:* and Resource:*

Recommendation.Text: Implement least-privilege access by scoping policies to specific actions and resources.

FindingInfo.Title: IAM role has properly scoped trust policy

Description: IAM role LambdaExecutionRole has a trust policy scoped to lambda.amazonaws.com

Recommendation.Text: Ensure trust policies are scoped to specific services or accounts.

FindingInfo.Title: CloudTrail is not enabled in all regions

Description: CloudTrail trail management-trail is not configured for multi-region logging

Recommendation.Text: Enable multi-region CloudTrail to capture API activity across all AWS regions.

FindingInfo.Title: CloudTrail log file validation is not enabled

Description: CloudTrail trail management-trail does not have log file integrity validation enabled

Recommendation.Text: Enable log file validation to ensure CloudTrail logs have not been tampered with.

FindingInfo.Title: CloudTrail logs are delivered to S3 bucket

Description: CloudTrail trail management-trail delivers logs to S3 bucket cloudtrail-logs-123456789012

Recommendation.Text: Configure CloudTrail to deliver log files to an S3 bucket for long-term storage.

FindingInfo.Title: CloudWatch alarms not configured for unauthorized API calls

Description: No CloudWatch alarm is configured to monitor unauthorized API calls

Recommendation.Text: Create CloudWatch alarms for metric filters monitoring unauthorized API calls.

FindingInfo.Title: CloudWatch log group has retention policy configured

Description: CloudWatch log group /aws/lambda/security-function has retention set to 90 days

Recommendation.Text: Set retention policies on all log groups to manage storage costs and compliance.

FindingInfo.Title: S3 bucket has public access enabled

Description: S3 bucket company-public-assets-123456789012 has Block Public Access settings disabled

Recommendation.Text: Enable S3 Block Public Access at the bucket level to prevent unintended public exposure.

FindingInfo.Title: S3 bucket has public access blocked

Description: S3 bucket company-internal-data-123456789012 has Block Public Access settings enabled

Recommendation.Text: Enable S3 Block Public Access at the bucket level to prevent unintended public exposure.

FindingInfo.Title: S3 bucket does not have default encryption enabled

Description: S3 bucket company-logs-123456789012 does not have default server-side encryption configured

Recommendation.Text: Enable default encryption on S3 buckets using SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS.

FindingInfo.Title: S3 bucket has versioning enabled

Description: S3 bucket company-internal-data-123456789012 has versioning enabled for data protection

Recommendation.Text: Enable versioning on S3 buckets to protect against accidental deletions and overwrites.

FindingInfo.Title: KMS key does not have automatic rotation enabled

Description: KMS key 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012 does not have automatic annual rotation enabled

Recommendation.Text: Enable automatic key rotation to rotate KMS keys annually.

FindingInfo.Title: KMS key has automatic rotation enabled

Description: KMS key 87654321-4321-4321-4321-210987654321 has automatic annual rotation enabled

Recommendation.Text: Enable automatic key rotation to rotate KMS keys annually.

FindingInfo.Title: Security group allows unrestricted inbound SSH access

Description: Security group sg-0123456789abcdef0 allows inbound SSH (port 22) from 0.0.0.0/0

Recommendation.Text: Restrict SSH access to specific IP ranges or use Systems Manager Session Manager instead.

FindingInfo.Title: Security group allows unrestricted inbound RDP access

Description: Security group sg-0123456789abcdef1 allows inbound RDP (port 3389) from 0.0.0.0/0

Recommendation.Text: Restrict RDP access to specific IP ranges or use a bastion host.

FindingInfo.Title: Security group restricts inbound access appropriately

Description: Security group sg-0123456789abcdef2 restricts inbound access to specific CIDR ranges

Recommendation.Text: Regularly review security group rules to ensure least-privilege network access.

FindingInfo.Title: VPC flow logs are not enabled

Description: VPC vpc-0123456789abcdef0 does not have flow logs enabled for network monitoring

Recommendation.Text: Enable VPC Flow Logs to capture network traffic metadata for security analysis.

FindingInfo.Title: VPC flow logs are enabled

Description: VPC vpc-0123456789abcdef1 has flow logs enabled and delivering to CloudWatch Logs

Recommendation.Text: Enable VPC Flow Logs to capture network traffic metadata for security analysis.

FindingInfo.Title: Security group allows unrestricted access to high-risk ports

Description: Security group sg-0aabbccdd1122334 allows inbound access on port 3306 (MySQL) from 0.0.0.0/0

Recommendation.Text: Restrict database ports to application security groups only, never open to the internet.

FindingInfo.Title: EC2 instance has critical vulnerability findings

Description: EC2 instance i-0123456789abcdef0 has 3 critical CVEs (CVE-2023-44487, CVE-2023-4911, CVE-2023-38545) requiring immediate patching

Recommendation.Text: Apply security patches immediately using Systems Manager Patch Manager or manual updates.

FindingInfo.Title: EC2 instance has high severity vulnerabilities

Description: EC2 instance i-0123456789abcdef1 has 5 high severity package vulnerabilities requiring patching

Recommendation.Text: Use AWS Systems Manager Patch Manager to automate patching of EC2 instances.

FindingInfo.Title: EC2 instance is fully patched

Description: EC2 instance i-0123456789abcdef2 has no critical or high severity vulnerability findings

Recommendation.Text: Continue regular patching using AWS Systems Manager Patch Manager.

FindingInfo.Title: EC2 instance is not managed by Systems Manager

Description: EC2 instance i-0123456789abcdef3 is not managed by AWS Systems Manager and cannot receive automated patches

Recommendation.Text: Install the SSM Agent and attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy to enable Systems Manager.

FindingInfo.Title: EC2 instance is managed by Systems Manager

Description: EC2 instance i-0123456789abcdef2 is managed by AWS Systems Manager with SSM Agent reporting healthy

Recommendation.Text: Ensure all EC2 instances have SSM Agent installed and are managed by Systems Manager.

FindingInfo.Title: GuardDuty is not enabled in all regions

Description: Amazon GuardDuty is not enabled in us-west-2, leaving the region without threat detection

Recommendation.Text: Enable GuardDuty in all regions to detect threats across your entire AWS footprint.

FindingInfo.Title: GuardDuty is enabled with threat detection active

Description: Amazon GuardDuty is enabled in us-east-1 with all protection plans active

Recommendation.Text: Enable GuardDuty in all regions to detect threats across your entire AWS footprint.

FindingInfo.Title: GuardDuty detected cryptocurrency mining activity

Description: GuardDuty detected CryptoCurrency:EC2/BitcoinTool.B!DNS activity on instance i-0123456789abcdef4

Recommendation.Text: Investigate the instance immediately, isolate it, and check for unauthorized access or malware.

FindingInfo.Title: GuardDuty detected unusual API call from known malicious IP

Description: GuardDuty detected UnauthorizedAccess:IAMUser/MaliciousIPCaller from IP 198.51.100.42 using credentials of user compromised-user

Recommendation.Text: Disable the compromised user credentials, review CloudTrail logs, and investigate scope of access.

FindingInfo.Title: Security Hub is enabled with standards active

Description: AWS Security Hub is enabled with CIS and AWS Foundational Security Best Practices standards

Recommendation.Text: Enable Security Hub with relevant security standards for centralized findings management.

FindingInfo.Title: Security Hub has unresolved critical findings

Description: Security Hub has 12 unresolved critical findings that require immediate attention

Recommendation.Text: Review and remediate critical findings in Security Hub, prioritizing by severity and resource exposure.

FindingInfo.Title: AWS Config is not enabled in all regions

Description: AWS Config recorder is not enabled in eu-west-1, preventing compliance monitoring

Recommendation.Text: Enable AWS Config in all regions to continuously monitor resource configuration compliance.

FindingInfo.Title: AWS Config is enabled with compliance rules

Description: AWS Config recorder is enabled in us-east-1 with 15 active compliance rules

Recommendation.Text: Enable AWS Config in all regions to continuously monitor resource configuration compliance.

FindingInfo.Title: AWS Config rule has non-compliant resources

Description: AWS Config rule required-tags has 23 non-compliant resources missing mandatory tags

Recommendation.Text: Apply required tags to all resources and use tag policies for enforcement.

FindingInfo.Title: Organization does not have service control policies enabled

Description: AWS Organization o-abc123def4 does not have Service Control Policies (SCPs) enabled for governance

Recommendation.Text: Enable SCPs in your organization to enforce guardrails across all member accounts.

FindingInfo.Title: Organization has organizational CloudTrail trail

Description: AWS Organization o-abc123def4 has an organizational CloudTrail trail for centralized logging

Recommendation.Text: Create an organization-level CloudTrail trail for centralized audit logging.

FindingInfo.Title: IAM access key has not been rotated in 90 days

Description: IAM user cicd-deployer has an access key that has not been rotated in 147 days

Recommendation.Text: Rotate IAM access keys every 90 days or switch to IAM roles for automated workloads.

FindingInfo.Title: S3 bucket does not have access logging enabled

Description: S3 bucket company-temp-uploads-123456789012 does not have server access logging enabled

Recommendation.Text: Enable server access logging on S3 buckets to track access requests for security auditing.

FindingInfo.Title: EC2 instance does not enforce IMDSv2

Description: EC2 instance i-0123456789abcdef5 allows IMDSv1 which is vulnerable to SSRF credential theft attacks

Recommendation.Text: Enforce IMDSv2 on all EC2 instances to prevent SSRF-based credential theft.

FindingInfo.Title: EC2 instance enforces IMDSv2

Description: EC2 instance i-0123456789abcdef2 enforces IMDSv2 with HttpTokens set to required

Recommendation.Text: Enforce IMDSv2 on all EC2 instances to prevent SSRF-based credential theft.

FindingInfo.Title: CloudTrail logs are not encrypted with KMS

Description: CloudTrail trail management-trail does not use KMS encryption for log files at rest

Recommendation.Text: Enable KMS encryption for CloudTrail logs to protect audit trail integrity.

FindingInfo.Title: Inspector does not have full coverage of EC2 instances

Description: Amazon Inspector only covers 60% of EC2 instances, leaving 4 instances without vulnerability scanning

Recommendation.Text: Ensure all EC2 instances have the SSM Agent installed to enable Inspector scanning coverage.

FindingInfo.Title: GuardDuty S3 Protection is not enabled

Description: GuardDuty S3 Protection feature is not enabled, limiting threat detection for S3 data events

Recommendation.Text: Enable GuardDuty S3 Protection to detect threats targeting your S3 buckets.

FindingInfo.Title: AWS Config delivery channel is configured

Description: AWS Config delivery channel is configured to send configuration snapshots to S3 and SNS notifications

Recommendation.Text: Configure AWS Config delivery channels for S3 storage and SNS notifications.

FindingInfo.Title: KMS key policy allows public access

Description: KMS key aabbccdd-1122-3344-5566-778899aabbcc has a key policy that allows access from any AWS principal

Recommendation.Text: Restrict KMS key policies to specific IAM principals and conditions.

FindingInfo.Title: Systems Manager patch compliance is not met

Description: Managed instance i-0123456789abcdef3 has 8 missing critical patches and is non-compliant

Recommendation.Text: Configure SSM Patch Manager maintenance windows to automate critical patch deployment.

FindingInfo.Title: CloudWatch does not have alarms for root account usage

Description: No CloudWatch alarm is configured to alert on root account usage which is a high-risk activity

Recommendation.Text: Create a CloudWatch alarm with metric filter for root account API activity.

FindingInfo.Title: CloudTrail is integrated with CloudWatch Logs

Description: CloudTrail trail management-trail delivers events to CloudWatch Logs for real-time monitoring

Recommendation.Text: Integrate CloudTrail with CloudWatch Logs for real-time alerting on API activity.

FindingInfo.Title: CloudWatch alarm configured for security group changes

Description: CloudWatch alarm is configured to detect and alert on security group configuration changes

Recommendation.Text: Create CloudWatch alarms for security-sensitive configuration changes.

FindingInfo.Title: GuardDuty EKS Protection is enabled

Description: GuardDuty EKS Runtime Monitoring and EKS Audit Log Monitoring are enabled

Recommendation.Text: Enable GuardDuty EKS protection features for container workload threat detection.

FindingInfo.Title: Inspector ECR scanning is enabled

Description: Amazon Inspector container image scanning is enabled for ECR repositories

Recommendation.Text: Enable Inspector ECR scanning to detect vulnerabilities in container images.

FindingInfo.Title: S3 bucket enforces SSL-only access

Description: S3 bucket company-internal-data-123456789012 has a bucket policy enforcing SSL-only connections

Recommendation.Text: Add a bucket policy condition to deny requests that are not over SSL/TLS.

FindingInfo.Title: EBS default encryption is enabled

Description: EBS default encryption is enabled in us-east-1 ensuring all new volumes are encrypted

Recommendation.Text: Enable EBS default encryption in all regions to ensure data-at-rest protection.

FindingInfo.Title: IAM credentials unused for 90 days are disabled

Description: IAM user former-contractor has credentials disabled after 90 days of inactivity

Recommendation.Text: Implement automated credential lifecycle policies to disable unused credentials.

FindingInfo.Title: AWS Config conformance pack is deployed

Description: AWS Config conformance pack SecurityBestPractices is deployed with 25 rules for compliance monitoring

Recommendation.Text: Deploy conformance packs to enforce organizational compliance standards.

FindingInfo.Title: Systems Manager inventory collection is enabled

Description: Systems Manager inventory collection is enabled for all managed instances with daily sync

Recommendation.Text: Enable SSM Inventory to maintain visibility into software and configuration across instances.

FindingInfo.Title: IAM Access Analyzer is enabled

Description: IAM Access Analyzer is enabled and monitoring for external access to resources

Recommendation.Text: Enable IAM Access Analyzer in all regions to identify resources shared externally.

FindingInfo.Title: GuardDuty Malware Protection is enabled

Description: GuardDuty Malware Protection is enabled to scan EBS volumes attached to potentially compromised instances

Recommendation.Text: Enable GuardDuty Malware Protection for automated malware scanning on suspicious instances.
